characters.name: Abbess Bryony
characters.description: Abbess Bryony12Abbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess MeriamKnown Successor:Abbot ThomasBooksAppears:Outcast of RedwallMentioned:The Long Patrol,High RhulainAbbess Bryonywas aRedwall Abbeymouse leader. She was alleged to be the great-granddaughter ofGonffandColumbine, granddaughter toGonff II, distantly related toDandin, and ancestor to theGonfelin Thieves,Samolus Fixa,Bisky, andAndio. She was the adopted mother ofVeil Sixclaw, and she succeededMeriamas Abbess ofRedwall Abbey. When Bryony first met the abandoned Veil, she immediately fell for the infant's charm and adopted the ferret as her own child. She cared deeply for Veil despite his obvious tendencies to the bad, and tried desperately to prove to the other Abbey dwellers that he could be good. After Veil was banished from Redwall, Bryony and her mole friendToggetpursued him to try to bring him back to the Abbey for a second chance. The mouse followed the ferret all the way toBat Mountpit, where Veil had been unhappily reunited with his real father,Swartt Sixclaw. Bryony befriendedSunflash the Maceduring the journey, and later tried to free him when he was captured by Swartt. Swartt attempted to kill her by throwing a javelin, but she was saved by Veil, who jumped in front of the missile and took the hit. He later died in her arms.

characters.name: Abbess Bryony
characters.description: Abbess Bryony12Abbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess MeriamKnown Successor:Abbot ThomasBooksAppears:Outcast of RedwallMentioned:The Long Patrol,High RhulainAbbess Bryonywas aRedwall Abbeymouse leader. characters.name: Abbess Fenna
characters.description: Abbess FennaAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:SquirrelGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot CarrulKnown Successor:Abbess FurtilaBooksAppears:LoamhedgeAbbessFennawas a female squirrel leader ofRedwall Abbey. She was friends withSpringaldandHorty. Along with her comrades, as well asBragoonandSarobando, Fenna journeyed toLoamhedge Abbeyas a youth to find a cure forMartha Braebuck's inability to walk. During the trip, she experienced dehydration, but recovered after Horty discovered a brook. She also found an admirer inWuddle, who doted on her the entire time the travelers were in the company of theGuoraf. Fenna also participated in thebattleagainstKharanjul'sHorde, but was forced to flee the fight by Bragoon and Sarobando, who held the vermin off while the trio of young ones escaped. She was appointed Abbess byAbbot Carrulafter he received a dream fromMartin the Warrior. Martin told Carrul that whoever carriedhis swordback to Redwall would be its new leader. Initially, Horty carried the sword, but he injured himself while showing off to the Guoraf shrews. As a result, Fenna took over sword carrying duties, an action which caused great relief among the Abbey dwellers, who were concerned about Horty's leadership abilities.

characters.name: Abbess Furtila
characters.description: Abbess FurtilaAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:UnknownGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess FennaKnown Successor:Abbot HumbleBooksMentioned:Rakkety Tam Abbess Furtilawas a leader ofRedwall Abbeywho served as the precursor toAbbot Humble. She did not appoint a successor, and passed away without doing so. Furtila was a very minor character, little is known about her.

characters.name: Abbess Germaine
characters.description: Abbess GermaineAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess Sylvaticus(of Loamhedge)Known Successor:Abbess Meriam(of Redwall)BooksAppears:Mossflower,The Legend of LukeMentioned:Redwall,Mattimeo,Mariel of Redwall,Outcast of Redwall,The Long Patrol,Loamhedge,The Sable Quean,The Redwall Warrior's CodeMediaVoice(s):Angela Mounsey Abbess Germainewas the female mouse co-founder ofRedwall Abbeyalong withMartin the Warrior. She was also the firstRecorder. An older mouse, she was formerly the last Abbess ofLoamhedge Abbey, but a plague forced her and others to abandon the building and travel toMossflower Woods. Abbess Germaine was most famous for designing the blueprints forRedwall Abbeyduring theGreat Mossflower War. Later, she hid theWarrior's Codethroughout the building.

characters.name: Abbess Germaine
characters.description: Abbess GermaineAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess Sylvaticus(of Loamhedge)Known Successor:Abbess Meriam(of Redwall)BooksAppears:Mossflower,The Legend of LukeMentioned:Redwall,Mattimeo,Mariel of Redwall,Outcast of Redwall,The Long Patrol,Loamhedge,The Sable Quean,The Redwall Warrior's CodeMediaVoice(s):Angela Mounsey Abbess Germainewas the female mouse co-founder ofRedwall Abbeyalong withMartin the Warrior. She was also the firstRecorder. An older mouse, she was formerly the last Abbess ofLoamhedge Abbey, but a plague forced her and others to abandon the building and travel toMossflower Woods. Abbess Germaine was most famous for designing the blueprints forRedwall Abbeyduring theGreat Mossflower War. Later, she hid theWarrior's Codethroughout the building.

characters.name: Abbess Lycian
characters.description: Abbess LycianAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot HumbleKnown Successor:Abbot DaucusBooksAppears:High Rhulain Abbess Lycianwas a young female mouse leader ofRedwall Abbey. She was younger than most Abbesses, but known for having a good sense of judgment and wisdom. She was great friends withBurbee, and enjoyed singing and drinking tea. She also loved riddle-solving, and helped solve most ofSister Geminya's riddles. Lycian had a fiercer side to her as well, which showed when the Abbey was threatened byGroffgut'sgang; she slammed a teapot into the head ofone of the rats, singlehandedly eliminating the invasion attempt. Later in life, she often exchanged writings with QueenTiria WildloughofGreen Isle, viaBrantalis Skyfurrow.

characters.name: Abbess Lycian
characters.description: Abbess LycianAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot HumbleKnown Successor:Abbot DaucusBooksAppears:High Rhulain Abbess Lycianwas a young female mouse leader ofRedwall Abbey. characters.name: Abbess Marjoram
characters.description: Abbess MarjoramAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess PerritKnown Successor:Abbot ThibbBooksAppears:The Sable Quean Abbess Marjoramwas the middle-aged female mouse leader ofRedwall Abbeyduring the reign ofVilayathe Sable Quean. She had a long-standing friendship with the traveling hedgehogOakheart Witherspyk; to him, she was "Marjy", while she called him "Oakie". She was  good friends withFriar Soogum, LordBrang Forgefire, andSkipperRuark Boldstream. Marjoram led the Abbey with a firm but kindly paw. She did not appreciate squabbles or disruptions of any sort. When the Bard of Redwall contest organized byGranvy Shtuckleerupted in a fight, she immediately cancelled the competition until everyone agreed to behave in a more orderly manner. Also, in the absence ofLog-a-LogJango, she took it upon herself to punish aGuosimshrew,Divvery, when his disobedience caused sentries to abandon their duties on the walltops; she hadSister Fumbrildiscipline him with a strict cleaning duty.

characters.name: Abbess Marjoram
characters.description: Abbess MarjoramAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess PerritKnown Successor:Abbot ThibbBooksAppears:The Sable Quean Abbess Marjoramwas the middle-aged female mouse leader ofRedwall Abbeyduring the reign ofVilayathe Sable Quean. characters.name: Abbess Meriam
characters.description: Abbess MeriamAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess GermaineKnown Successor:Abbess BryonyBooksAppears:Outcast of Redwall Abbess Meriamwas a female mouse leader ofRedwall Abbey. She was taller than most mice, and was slender, middle-aged, and known for her great wisdom and serenity. She rarely smiled, but she was still a very kind Abbess. Her walking was so neat that it looked like she would have floated with her long habit. Meriam was great friends withBryony, whom she later appointed Abbess after she retired.

characters.name: Abbess Mhera
characters.description: Abbess MheraAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:OtterGender:FemaleFamily informationParent(s):RillflagFilornSiblings(s):Deyna(brother)ChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess Songbreeze SwifteyeKnown Successor:Abbot ApodemusBooksAppears:TaggerungMediaVoice(s):Rachel Murphy AbbessMherawas a female otter leader ofRedwall Abbey. She was the daughter ofRillflagandFilorn, elder sister toDeyna, and a descendant ofDeyna I. During the time when Deyna was cast out of theJuskarath,Lady Cregga Rose Eyesdecided that Mhera should serve as the next Abbess of Redwall Abbey. She then put into motion a plan that she andAbbess Songbreeze Swifteyehad conceived many seasons prior.

characters.name: Abbess Mhera
characters.description: Abbess MheraAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:OtterGender:FemaleFamily informationParent(s):RillflagFilornSiblings(s):Deyna(brother)ChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess Songbreeze SwifteyeKnown Successor:Abbot ApodemusBooksAppears:TaggerungMediaVoice(s):Rachel Murphy AbbessMherawas a female otter leader ofRedwall Abbey. She then put into motion a plan that she andAbbess Songbreeze Swifteyehad conceived many seasons prior.

characters.name: Abbess Perrit
characters.description: Abbess PerritAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:SquirrelGender:FemaleMate:DwinkFamily informationMate:DwinkOffspring:MitteeChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot GlisamKnown Successor:Abbess MarjoramBooksAppears:Doomwyte AbbessPerritwas a pretty female squirrel leader ofRedwall Abbey. She was the mate ofDwinkand the mother ofMittee. She later had a granddaughter. Perrit succeededAbbot Glisamas Abbess of Redwall. Aside from Dwink, she was also good friends withUmfry SpikkleandBisky. Not much is known of her family and past, as she was introduced simply as one of thekitchenhelpers underFriar Skurpul.

characters.name: Abbess Songbreeze Swifteye
characters.description: Abbess Songbreeze SwifteyeAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:SquirrelGender:FemaleFamily informationParent(s):Janglur SwifteyeRimrose SwifteyeChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot ArvenKnown Successor:Abbess MheraBooksAppears:MarlfoxMentioned:Taggerung Songbreeze Swifteye, also known asSong, was a female squirrel leader ofRedwall Abbey. She was the daughter ofRimroseandJanglur Swifteyeand the granddaughter ofEllayoandGawjo Swifteye. Renowned for her singing voice, Songbreeze was frequently called upon to entertain her family and friends. During her early seasons, her family were nomadicMossflower Woodsresidents, until the threat of the Marlfoxes forced them to relocate to Redwall. While there, Songbreeze and her friendsDipplerandDannwere placed on guard duty inGreat Hall; however, they were inexperienced, and unable to stop the MarlfoxesAscrodandVannanfrom stealingTapestryofMartin the Warrior.

characters.name: Abbess Songbreeze Swifteye
characters.description: Abbess Songbreeze SwifteyeAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:SquirrelGender:FemaleFamily informationParent(s):Janglur SwifteyeRimrose SwifteyeChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot ArvenKnown Successor:Abbess MheraBooksAppears:MarlfoxMentioned:Taggerung Songbreeze Swifteye, also known asSong, was a female squirrel leader ofRedwall Abbey. She was the daughter ofRimroseandJanglur Swifteyeand the granddaughter ofEllayoandGawjo Swifteye. Renowned for her singing voice, Songbreeze was frequently called upon to entertain her family and friends. While there, Songbreeze and her friendsDipplerandDannwere placed on guard duty inGreat Hall; however, they were inexperienced, and unable to stop the MarlfoxesAscrodandVannanfrom stealingTapestryofMartin the Warrior.

characters.name: Abbess Sylvaticus
characters.description: Abbess SylvaticusAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:NoneKnown Successor:Abbess GermaineBooksMentioned:Loamhedge Abbess Sylvaticuswas the first Abbess ofLoamhedge Abbey, which suggests that she was in fact a mouse. Reportedly she was loved by all and was a wise old creature. Sylvaticus was entombed inside of the Loamhedge cemetery, located inside of Loamhedge's boundary walls; laterSister Amylleft her "secret" in the grave.

characters.name: Abbess Tansy
characters.description: Abbess TansyAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:HedgehogGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot DurralKnown Successor:Abbot ArvenBooksAppears:Pearls of Lutra,The Long PatrolMentioned:Marlfox,Taggerung AbbessTansywas a female hedgehog leader ofRedwall Abbey. As a youth, she was a good friend ofCraklyn,Piknim, andArven, who called her "Tansy Pansy" when he was aDibbun. The elder Redwallers always liked her, and she was given permission to leave the Abbey by herself, something most younger Redwallers weren't allowed to do. As one who was clever and very perseverant, she was the head searcher in the quest for theTears of all Oceans, which were secreted within the Abbey's walls. The hunt began after Tansy and Arven accidentally stumbled into a crack that contained the skeleton ofGraylunkin theMossflowerquarry. Tansy received a visit from the spirit ofMartin the Warriorin her dreams and was inspired by him. After successfully locating all six pearls in order to ransomAbbot Durralfromcorsairs, a rescue party safely returned with Durral, so she flung them into the ocean to be forever lost and unable to cause strife and greed in anyone.

characters.name: Abbess Tansy
characters.description: Abbess TansyAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:HedgehogGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot DurralKnown Successor:Abbot ArvenBooksAppears:Pearls of Lutra,The Long PatrolMentioned:Marlfox,Taggerung AbbessTansywas a female hedgehog leader ofRedwall Abbey. As a youth, she was a good friend ofCraklyn,Piknim, andArven, who called her "Tansy Pansy" when he was aDibbun. After successfully locating all six pearls in order to ransomAbbot Durralfromcorsairs, a rescue party safely returned with Durral, so she flung them into the ocean to be forever lost and unable to cause strife and greed in anyone.

characters.name: Abbess Vale
characters.description: Abbess ValeAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:FemaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot SaxtusKnown Successor:Abbot SaxusBooksAppears:SalamandastronMentioned:Marlfox,Redwall AbbeyCraft: The Corsair's Last Treasure Abbess Valewas a female mouse leader ofRedwall Abbeywho assumed the role following either the death or retirement ofAbbot Saxtus. She was in charge of Redwall when it experienced theDryditch Feverepidemic, and helped care for the ill and dying Redwallers. Her friends includedBremmun,Faith Spinney,Brother Hollyberry, andFurgle the Hermit. She was known to often be rather irritable, fretful, and tired.

characters.name: Abbot (LLOR)
characters.description: The AbbotAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:UnknownKnown Successor:UnknownBooksAppears:Games:The Lost Legends of Redwall (app),The Wildcat Scroll TheAbbotofRedwall Abbeywas an old male mouse. His initial inclination was to be against giving theGingivera ClantheScroll of Inheritance, but he letEmorydecide.

characters.name: Abbot (LLOR)
characters.description: The AbbotAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:UnknownKnown Successor:UnknownBooksAppears:Games:The Lost Legends of Redwall (app),The Wildcat Scroll TheAbbotofRedwall Abbeywas an old male mouse. His initial inclination was to be against giving theGingivera ClantheScroll of Inheritance, but he letEmorydecide.

characters.name: Abbot Apodemus
characters.description: Abbot ApodemusAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess MheraKnown Successor:Abbot PhreddBooksAppears:TrissAbbot Apodemuswas a male mouse leader ofRedwall Abbey. He was described as having a yellow neck and being stout and fat. Apodemus was close friends withMalbun Grimp. He kept a list of troublemakers called "Abbot's Report", primarily used when theDibbunswere in some kind of trouble. After the failed trip ofCrikulusand Malbun to locateBrockhall, Apodemus tried to get some information about the trip from Crikulus in his sleep; it wasn't very successful, as he was interrupted byMemm Flackery, who woke up the shrew. Apodemus was also a good friend ofOvus, though several Redwallers thought he was too soft and not strict enough with the fussy old bird. When the Abbey was threatened byZassaliss,Harssacss, andSesstra, Apodemus put into motion a self-imposed siege, forbidding anyone from leaving the Abbey until the threat had passed. He then asked Ovus for help - the owl andBluddbeakfought the adders, but were both instantly slain. Apodemus was devastated by their loss and eulogized them by sharing a special poem in their memory. Later, he welcomedTrisscar Swordmaidand her companions into the Abbey when they were being pursued byPrincess Kurdaand theFreebooters. Once this situation had been resolved, the Abbot made the unusual decision to let theSword of Martinbe carried across the seas toRiftgard Fortress, where Trisscar used it to defeatKing Agarnuand free his slaves.

characters.name: Abbot Arven
characters.description: Abbot Arven12Abbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:SquirrelGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess TansyKnown Successor:Abbess Songbreeze SwifteyeBooksAppears:Pearls of Lutra,The Long PatrolMentioned:Marlfox,Taggerung AbbotArvenwas a male squirrel leader and Champion ofRedwall Abbey. As aDibbun, he was very good friends withTansyand had a special nickname for her, "Tansy Pansy." When out searching for herbs with Tansy, he accidentally fell into a hole containing the skeleton of the weaselGraylunk, which spurred the search for theTears of all Oceans. Arven was the ringleader of a Dibbun group that includedDiggumandGurrbowl. He often led them into mischief and could always be found making trouble somewhere. Once, he ventured intoMossflower Woodsbelieving that when he was found he would be praised. Despite this, he contributed to the search for the Tears on several occasions.

characters.name: Abbot Arven
characters.description: Abbot Arven12Abbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:SquirrelGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess TansyKnown Successor:Abbess Songbreeze SwifteyeBooksAppears:Pearls of Lutra,The Long PatrolMentioned:Marlfox,Taggerung AbbotArvenwas a male squirrel leader and Champion ofRedwall Abbey. As aDibbun, he was very good friends withTansyand had a special nickname for her, "Tansy Pansy." When out searching for herbs with Tansy, he accidentally fell into a hole containing the skeleton of the weaselGraylunk, which spurred the search for theTears of all Oceans. Arven was the ringleader of a Dibbun group that includedDiggumandGurrbowl. He often led them into mischief and could always be found making trouble somewhere. Once, he ventured intoMossflower Woodsbelieving that when he was found he would be praised. Despite this, he contributed to the search for the Tears on several occasions.

characters.name: Abbot Bernard
characters.description: Abbot BernardAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot ThomasKnown Successor:Abbot SaxtusBooksAppears:Mariel of RedwallMentioned:The Bellmaker,Martin the Warrior Abbot Bernardwas a mouse leader ofRedwall Abbey. He was a close friend of the herbalist,Brother Simeon. He also was a friend of MotherMellusand helped raiseDandin, among many otherDibbuns. Abbot Bernard's main qualities included humility, strength, and honesty. He made great efforts to transmit his values and teachings to all he encountered, young and old, whether he knew them for many years or recently met them. Yet he was very forgiving of everyone's mistakes and was always ready to admit his own. He also knew what his limitations were and did not hesitate to delegate some tasks to other creatures and encourage them to do what they were expert at doing, such as cooking or caring for Dibbuns or preparing for war. Abbot Bernard's main qualities included humility, strength, and honesty. He made great efforts to transmit his values and teachings to all he encountered, young and old, whether he knew them for many years or recently met them. Yet he was very forgiving of everyone's mistakes and was always ready to admit his own. He also knew what his limitations were and did not hesitate to delegate some tasks to other creatures and encourage them to do what they were expert at doing, such as cooking or caring for Dibbuns or preparing for war. Although he was very wise and knowledgeable, the father Abbot was not as aware of his surroundings as Simeon, although the brother was blind. This was often the occasion for jokes and teasing among the old friends.

characters.name: Abbot Carrul
characters.description: Abbot CarrulAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot PhreddKnown Successor:Abbess FennaBooksAppears:Loamhedge Abbot Carrulwas a male mouse leader ofRedwall Abbeyand the successor ofAbbot Phredd. As aDibbun, he caused mayhem withSister Portulaand was sent to work inthe Kitchenfor five days. He was also known to have cheated at the nut and spoon race for five seasons straight by sticking the nut to the spoon with honey. As an adult, Carrul was an unusually active Abbot, even going so far as to participate in the war againstRaga Bolby fighting alongside the Abbey defenders. He was, however, inexperienced in matters of war; Carrul turned his back on the enemy at one point and was very nearly killed byFerron.Martha Braebucksaved his life, incidentally discovering that she had the ability to walk in the process.

characters.name: Abbot Carrul
characters.description: Abbot CarrulAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot PhreddKnown Successor:Abbess FennaBooksAppears:Loamhedge Abbot Carrulwas a male mouse leader ofRedwall Abbeyand the successor ofAbbot Phredd. He was also known to have cheated at the nut and spoon race for five seasons straight by sticking the nut to the spoon with honey. He was, however, inexperienced in matters of war; Carrul turned his back on the enemy at one point and was very nearly killed byFerron.Martha Braebucksaved his life, incidentally discovering that she had the ability to walk in the process.

characters.name: Abbot Cedric
characters.description: Abbot CedricAbbot Cedric in The Flowers of IcetorAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot SaxusKnown Successor:Abbot MortimerBooksMentioned:RedwallMediaGames:Redwall AbbeyCraft: The Corsair's Last Treasure,The Flowers of Icetor Abbot Cedricwas mentioned byMethuselah,the Recorder, as the Abbot who ledRedwallimmediately beforeAbbot Mortimer. While in theRedwallsaga books, Cedric's species is never stated, he appears as a mouse inThe Lost Legends of Redwallvideo games.

characters.name: Abbot Cedric
characters.description: Abbot CedricAbbot Cedric in The Flowers of IcetorAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot SaxusKnown Successor:Abbot MortimerBooksMentioned:RedwallMediaGames:Redwall AbbeyCraft: The Corsair's Last Treasure,The Flowers of Icetor Abbot Cedricwas mentioned byMethuselah,the Recorder, as the Abbot who ledRedwallimmediately beforeAbbot Mortimer. While in theRedwallsaga books, Cedric's species is never stated, he appears as a mouse inThe Lost Legends of Redwallvideo games.

characters.name: Abbot Daucus
characters.description: Abbot DaucusAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess LycianKnown Successor:Abbot GlisamBooksAppears:Eulalia!Abbot Daucuswas a male mouse leader ofRedwall Abbey. He was a brisk, energetic mouse in his mid-seasons, and was described as having a scrubby ginger beard. Daucus seemed to be much more strict and warlike than his predecessors. Influenced byForemoleBurffandMarja Dubbidge, he made the rare decision to exileOrkwil Prinkfor thievery, warning him not to attempt to enter Redwall again until his sentence was up. This decision was later rescinded when Orkwil andGorath the Flamereturned with dire news of theSea Raiders; Daucus, being fair-minded, allowed Orkwil to stay safe in the Abbey while the danger was present. Daucus was also a scholar of Badger Lore; he was one of few non-badger species who knew of the importance of the titleTabura, and greatly honored the TaburaMelutarwhen he arrived at the Abbey. When the Sea Raiders andBrownratsteamed up to attack Gorath and a band ofGuosimand otters, Daucus and the Tabura conferred and developed a plan to save them. While the Tabura rang thebells, calling several woodlanders to help, Abbot Daucus gathered the Redwallers and prepared them for war. He then led the charge against the Sea Raiders and the Brownrats, with a reformed Orkwil Prink at his side.

characters.name: Abbot Daucus
characters.description: Abbot DaucusAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess LycianKnown Successor:Abbot GlisamBooksAppears:Eulalia!Abbot Daucuswas a male mouse leader ofRedwall Abbey. characters.name: Abbot Durral
characters.description: Abbot DurralAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot MordalfusKnown Successor:Abbess TansyBooksAppears:Pearls of Lutra Abbot Durralwas an old male mouse leader ofRedwall Abbeywho served in the role for seven seasons. He was known to be very humble and kind, and enjoyed cooking, having once worked in thekitchenprior to the ascension to his higher position. During his seventh and final season as Abbot, Durral was kidnapped by monitor lizards under the command ofLask Frildur, who believed the Redwallers were hiding theTears of all Oceans. Frildur intended Durral to be held in captivity byUblaz Mad Eyesuntil the Redwallers could locate the pearls and exchange them as ransom. During the return voyage toSampetrawith his captors, Durral befriendedRomsca, the ferret captain of theWaveworm.

characters.name: Abbot Durral
characters.description: Abbot DurralAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot MordalfusKnown Successor:Abbess TansyBooksAppears:Pearls of Lutra Abbot Durralwas an old male mouse leader ofRedwall Abbeywho served in the role for seven seasons. characters.name: Abbot Glisam
characters.description: Abbot GlisamAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:DormouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot DaucusKnown Successor:Abbess PerritBooksAppears:DoomwyteAbbot Glisamwas an old male dormouse leader ofRedwall Abbey. He held the role for many seasons. His personality was different from most Redwall Abbots and Abbesses, who were inclined to heal and be peaceful. LikeAbbot Daucus,Abbot Carrul, andAbbot Thibb, he tended to be more warlike; apparently, he had experience with thebow, as he was able to fire the weapon and have his arrows hit the ground near retreatingenemies. It was also speculated that he had experience in sailing, forRorguscalled him his "shipmate" after Glisam toldSister Violetthere was a lot she didn't know about him. He assisted in the search for the eyes of theGreat Doomwyte Idolby helping solve riddles, and found one of the jewels hidden in a clay kitchen tray. After the defeat ofKorvus Skurr, and the acquisition of the fourth and final Doomwyte Eye, Glisam had the jewels buried above the hill that was once the lair of theDoomwytesin honor of those who had died in the battle there. In later seasons, he was confined to a wheelchair, due to his rheumatism. He had to be assisted byInfirmary KeeperBrother Torilis. After he appointedPerritas his successor, Glisam became the Abbey school teacher, focusing especially on educating the illiterate hedgehogUmfry Spikkle. Not to be confused withFriar Glisum.

characters.name: Abbot Glisam
characters.description: Abbot GlisamAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:DormouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot DaucusKnown Successor:Abbess PerritBooksAppears:DoomwyteAbbot Glisamwas an old male dormouse leader ofRedwall Abbey. characters.name: Abbot Humble
characters.description: Abbot HumbleAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:HedgehogGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess FurtilaKnown Successor:Abbess LycianBooksAppears:Rakkety TamMediaVoice(s):Gordon Hall Humblewas a male hedgehog leader ofRedwall Abbeyduring theSeasons of the Savage. Prior to serving as Abbot, he was aCellar Keeperand extremely knowledgeable on manycordials and ales. He was a cousin ofHitheryon Jem. Two seasons after the death ofAbbess Furtila, Humble was appointed Abbot by a Council of Elders. It took much persuasion to convince Humble to accept the role, and even then only under certain conditions - he refused to reside in the traditional Abbot's dormitory, choosing instead to sleep in the cellars as he had always done. He also refused to abandon his barrels of various brews, and checked them every morning upon waking.

characters.name: Abbot Humble
characters.description: Abbot HumbleAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:HedgehogGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess FurtilaKnown Successor:Abbess LycianBooksAppears:Rakkety TamMediaVoice(s):Gordon Hall Humblewas a male hedgehog leader ofRedwall Abbeyduring theSeasons of the Savage. He also refused to abandon his barrels of various brews, and checked them every morning upon waking.

characters.name: Abbot Mordalfus
characters.description: Abbot MordalfusAbbot Mordalfus from theRedwall TV SeriesAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot MortimerKnown Successor:Abbot DurralBooksAppears:Redwall,Mattimeo,The Great Redwall Feast,The Redwall Cookbook,A Redwall Winter's TaleMentioned:LoamhedgeMediaVoice(s):John StockerNick BatyGordon HallTV Series:Season 1|Season 2Abbot Mordalfus, also known asBrother Alf, was a male mouse leader ofRedwall Abbey. He was the successor ofAbbot Mortimer, his old friend, who appointed him to the role. Mordalfus was skilled at fishing and served as caretaker forthe pond. He was a trusted friend ofMatthias. As Abbot, Mordalfus was a gentle and wise leader, although he had the tendency to trust too much in the goodness of others. He usually had a good sense of priorities and often advised rest, food, and other normal activities in the midst of great turmoil. WhenSlagar the CruelkidnappedMattimeoand other young Redwallers, Mordalfus helped restore order and calm. Mordalfus wore spectacles when he was older and often looked above them while talking to young ones. A thinker rather than a creature of action, he believed in the power of dreams and reflection.

characters.name: Abbot Mordalfus
characters.description: Abbot MordalfusAbbot Mordalfus from theRedwall TV SeriesAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot MortimerKnown Successor:Abbot DurralBooksAppears:Redwall,Mattimeo,The Great Redwall Feast,The Redwall Cookbook,A Redwall Winter's TaleMentioned:LoamhedgeMediaVoice(s):John StockerNick BatyGordon HallTV Series:Season 1|Season 2Abbot Mordalfus, also known asBrother Alf, was a male mouse leader ofRedwall Abbey. characters.name: Abbot Mortimer
characters.description: Abbot Mortimer123Abbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleDeath:Murdered byCluny the ScourgeChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot CedricKnown Successor:Abbot MordalfusBooksAppears:Redwall,The Redwall Warrior's CodeMentioned:MattimeoMediaVoice(s):Chris Wiggins (Redwall)Geoff LavelleTV Series:Season 1Abbot Mortimerwas a male mouse leader andInfirmary KeeperofRedwall Abbey. He was the successor ofAbbot Cedricand the predecessor ofAbbot Mordalfus. Mortimer was friends withJessandMr. Squirrel, as well asMatthias. He was described as gentle, kind-hearted, and well-educated on Abbey history, knowing stories aboutLoamhedge AbbeyandMartin the Warrior. During Mortimer's abbacy,Cluny the Scourgeand hishordeattempted to conquer Redwall as theSummer of the Late Roseunfolded. He ordered the Redwallers not to attack the vermin when they were retreating after a battle. Eventually, Redwall wassuccessfully infiltratedand captured by Cluny, which resulted in the detainment and captivity of Mortimer. When Cluny then threatened the Abbey residents, Mortimer verbally defended them, prompting Cluny to assault the old mouse with the poisoned barb on his tail, fatally wounding him. Mortimer died shortly thereafter. Before his passing, he designated Brother Alf as his successor, instructed Matthias to assume the roles of Abbey Warrior and protector ofCornflower Fieldmouse, and formally named theSword of Martin"Ratdeath."

characters.name: Abbot Mortimer
characters.description: Abbot Mortimer123Abbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleDeath:Murdered byCluny the ScourgeChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot CedricKnown Successor:Abbot MordalfusBooksAppears:Redwall,The Redwall Warrior's CodeMentioned:MattimeoMediaVoice(s):Chris Wiggins (Redwall)Geoff LavelleTV Series:Season 1Abbot Mortimerwas a male mouse leader andInfirmary KeeperofRedwall Abbey. Mortimer died shortly thereafter. Before his passing, he designated Brother Alf as his successor, instructed Matthias to assume the roles of Abbey Warrior and protector ofCornflower Fieldmouse, and formally named theSword of Martin"Ratdeath."

characters.name: Abbot Phredd
characters.description: Abbot PhreddAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:HedgehogGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot ApodemusKnown Successor:Abbot CarrulBooksAppears:Loamhedge Abbot Phreddwas an ancient male hedgehog leader ofRedwall Abbeywho served in the role for a great length of time. He took an active interest in the search for the geographic location ofLoamhedge Abbeyand discovered records written byTim Churchmousechronicling the kidnapping of himself and other young ones from Redwall and their journey as captives ofSlagar the Cruel. Feeling the weight of old age, he passed the position of Abbot toCarruland retired to become theGatekeeper. After Carrul retired and passed leadership toFenna, Phredd and Carrul shared the position of Gatekeeper until Phredd passed away.

characters.name: Abbot Phredd
characters.description: Abbot PhreddAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:HedgehogGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot ApodemusKnown Successor:Abbot CarrulBooksAppears:Loamhedge Abbot Phreddwas an ancient male hedgehog leader ofRedwall Abbeywho served in the role for a great length of time. After Carrul retired and passed leadership toFenna, Phredd and Carrul shared the position of Gatekeeper until Phredd passed away.

characters.name: Abbot Saxtus
characters.description: Abbot SaxtusAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot BernardKnown Successor:Abbess ValeBooksAppears:Mariel of Redwall,Martin the Warrior,The BellmakerMentioned:Salamandastron Abbot Saxtuswas a male harvest mouse leader ofRedwall Abbeyand the childhood friend ofDandinandDurry Quill. Unlike otherDibbuns, Saxtus was known for being well-behaved and studious. Saxtus helped defend Redwall whenGreypatchand his crew tried to conquer the Abbey; his weapons were aslingandspear. He succeededAbbot Bernardand was the incumbent Abbot when the story ofMartin the Warrior's youth was told to Redwallers. He also served as AbbeyRecorderfor a stint of time. Saxtus later became good friends withBrother Simeon,Rufe Brush, andJoseph the Bellmaker.

characters.name: Abbot Saxtus
characters.description: Abbot SaxtusAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:MouseGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbot BernardKnown Successor:Abbess ValeBooksAppears:Mariel of Redwall,Martin the Warrior,The BellmakerMentioned:Salamandastron Abbot Saxtuswas a male harvest mouse leader ofRedwall Abbeyand the childhood friend ofDandinandDurry Quill. Unlike otherDibbuns, Saxtus was known for being well-behaved and studious. Saxtus helped defend Redwall whenGreypatchand his crew tried to conquer the Abbey; his weapons were aslingandspear. Saxtus later became good friends withBrother Simeon,Rufe Brush, andJoseph the Bellmaker.

characters.name: Abbot Saxus
characters.description: Abbot SaxusAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:UnknownGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess ValeKnown Successor:Abbot CedricBooksMentioned:MattimeoAbbot Saxuswas a male leader ofRedwall Abbey.Friar Hugomentions that he wrote a recipe for Abbot's Cake. His species is unknown. Not to be confused withAbbot Saxtus.

characters.name: Abbot Thibb
characters.description: Abbot ThibbAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:SquirrelGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess MarjoramKnown Successor:UnknownBooksAppears:The Rogue CrewAbbot Thibbwas a male squirrel leader ofRedwall Abbeywho helped with the defense of the structure when it was attacked byRazzid Wearatand hiscrew. He was young for an Abbot. Thibb had no-nonsense tendencies, and did not suffer fools and troublemakers easily. He was known to have a slight fear of healers andinfirmaries. When Razzid arrived at Redwall, Thibb dressed up asMartin the Warrior, coating Martin'sswordwith oil and setting it ablaze to add drama to the display. In this array, he stood atop Redwall's battlements, holding the flaming sword aloft. The ruse temporarily drove away Razzid, who had pyrophobia. He credited Martin for this concept, which he claimed came to him after an intense period of staring at theRedwall Tapestry.

characters.name: Abbot Thomas
characters.description: Abbot ThomasAbbey LeaderBiographical informationSpecies:UnknownGender:MaleChronologyKnown Predecessor:Abbess BryonyKnown Successor:Abbot BernardBooksMentioned:Mariel of Redwall Abbot Thomaswas a male leader ofRedwall Abbey. He is mentioned as having a large final jubilee, at whichTarquin Longleap Woodsorreland his fatherLorquinattended. He was a precursor toAbbot Bernard; his species is unknown.
